goal: 恢复 GitHub Actions 运行结果可读性，定位 Run 29920336923 云端 preflight 失败步骤，最小修复并取得一次真实 success 运行。

rootCause.summary: GitHub Actions build did not produce the installer because package.json explicitly set build.electronDist to node_modules/electron/dist, but that directory did not exist after npm ci on windows-latest.
evidence: actions-build.log: The specified electronDist does not exist: D:\a\AI-Workbench\AI-Workbench\node_modules\electron\dist.
preflight-summary.json: artifactExists=false, unpackedExists=false, artifactPath empty, sha256 empty.
rootCause.secondaryIssue: scripts/verify-install-release.mjs read stale nsis-install-uninstall.json when artifact was missing, creating confusing evidence where install/uninstall appeared passed despite missing installer.

fixes.change: Removed build.electronDist so electron-builder can resolve/download Electron runtime in CI instead of failing on a missing explicit path; added --publish never to dist:win to prevent CI implicit publishing during 3A.
Deletes stale nsis-install-uninstall.json at preflight start and reads NSIS evidence only when the current helper run produced it; unreadable package scan directories are skipped instead of crashing.
Uses a unique installed smoke runtime directory per run to avoid stale runtime cleanup failures.
Added a current-version release output cleaner used before dist:win to reduce repeated-build residue.
Added Step Summary diagnostics and final gate checks for build outcome, preflight outcome, and installer existence.
Ignored temporary downloaded Actions artifact directories under verification/install-release/actions-*/.

npmRunVerifyInstallRelease.reason: Local existing release directory had win-unpacked removed/locked, so build.unpackedExists=false; NSIS install, installed smoke-test, uninstall, dependency fallback, port conflict fallback, and security scan passed against the existing installer.

previousRun.logFailedCommand: failed locally because GitHub CLI could not write run-log cache under AppData, but artifact evidence was readable.

knownIssues: shared_managed production injection remains blocked and is intentionally not handled in this task.
